summary: Completed testing of Trial Balance Report and Scheduled Backups features. All backend APIs (12/12 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/trial-balance - Returns account balances with totals ✓
Backend: GET /api/reports/trial-balance with date filter ✓
Backend: Trial balance account structure validation ✓
Backend: Trial balance unauthorized access returns 401 ✓
Backend: GET /api/admin/backup-schedule - Returns schedule settings ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/backup-schedule - Enable daily backup ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/backup-schedule - Disable backup ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/backup-schedule - Weekly frequency ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/backup-schedule - Invalid frequency returns 400 ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/backup-schedule - Invalid time returns 400 ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/backup-now - Triggers immediate backup ✓
Backend: Backup schedule unauthorized access returns 401 ✓
Frontend: Trial Balance page loads with data-testid='trial-balance-page' ✓
Frontend: Trial Balance table displays account balances ✓
Frontend: Trial Balance shows balanced status (green indicator) ✓
Frontend: Trial Balance shows Total Debit/Credit/Difference ✓
Frontend: Trial Balance has PDF and Excel export buttons ✓
Frontend: Trial Balance has date filter functionality ✓
Frontend: Data Management page loads ✓
Frontend: Scheduled Backups section UI with toggle switch ✓
Frontend: Run Now button triggers backup and updates history ✓
Frontend: Recent Backups section shows backup history with record counts ✓
Frontend: Backup files created on server at /app/backend/backups/ ✓
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial Balance Report and Scheduled Backups features fully tested and working. Trial Balance shows balanced status (AED 268,815.10 debit = credit). Scheduled Backups use APScheduler, store files at /app/backend/backups/, and backup history is persisted in MongoDB backup_history collection. Run Now button creates immediate backup with record counts. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

trial_balance_report.details: Returns all account balances with debit/credit totals, is_balanced flag, and difference calculation

scheduled_backups.details: APScheduler-based backups with daily/weekly/monthly frequency options, backup files stored on server

backup_files_verified.note: Backup files contain all system data and are auto-cleaned (keeps last 10)
